keyTerms.Lorentz force: The total electromagnetic force exerted on a charged particle moving through electric and magnetic fields
keyTerms.utilitas: Vitruvius's principle of utility — a building must serve its intended function
keyTerms.venustas: Vitruvius's principle of beauty — a building must delight the senses
keyTerms.genius loci: The spirit of a place; the idea that great architecture responds to its specific site, light, and culture
keyTerms.biophilic design: A contemporary architectural approach that integrates natural elements to improve human wellbeing
